title: PrimaFIT Pro Speed Skipping Rope Adult Fitness for Men Women Weighted Jump Rope 3m Adjustable Self-Locking Aluminium Boxing Gym MMA Crossfit Workout Spare Cable Weights Protectors Carry Bag
features: 👌 PROFESSIONAL SPEED SKIPPING ROPE - STRONG, LIGHT, AND ULTRA-FAST - JUMP FAST and SMOOTHLY due to premium rapid double ball bearings, offering 360°rotation, giving you an amazing speed. It delivers a smooth and effortless spin that is ideal for any calorie-burning workout, HIIT, Boxing and MMA

👌 WEIGHTED JUMP ROPE with ERGONOMIC SHAPED ANTI-SLIP HANDLE DESIGN - allows perfect hold even in intensive jumping sessions. Non-slip texture design ensures firm grip and prevents slip effectively. Adapted to human anatomy for your best performance; Additional removable weights built in the handles included.

💪 DURABLE and TANGLE-FREE with OPTIMUM WEIGHT DISTRIBUTION: - This skipping rope is made of steel wires that are coated with strong PVC material, making it durable even after a long time of exercising. PVC coating provides better protection for the heavy skipping ropes and avoids wearing-out. Keeps stable rhythm of rope skipping even after a prolonged exercise.

⌚ EASILY ADJUSTABLE due to SELF-LOCKING SYSTEM - EFFORTLESSLY ADJUST WITH THE TOUCH OF YOUR THUMB - Not necessary to cut the rope – just plug it in, release, and ready to jump. Customize quickly the length to suit your needs, making it suitable for all ages and all skill levels.

💪 ULTRA-STRONG STEEL CABLE WITH ADDITIONAL PROTECTION, EXTREMELY EASY TO OPERATE– Every jumping rope set comes with FREE ADDITIONAL ROPE that do not bend or twist, 3m each with PVC protection coating and 2 ADDITIONAL FREE unique OUTDOOR PROTECTORS for hard surfaces. Convenient carry bag included. Extended INTERNATIONAL WARRANTY provided.
description: PrimaFit Pro Speed Premium Weighted Skipping Rope is a Professional Adjustable Jump Rope, supported by rapid 2 Ball Bearings system, ideal home gym equipment for Fitness Workouts, Fat Burning Cardio Exercises, Boxing, Conditioning, Martial Arts, Crossfit, MMA, HIIT, Interval training and Double Unders (Double jumps). The 17,5cm handles are made from high-quality aluminum alloy, that doesn’t damage when the handles accidentally drop off. Even if your palms are sweaty from prolonged exercise, the jump rope will not slip out. With its unique self-locking design ajdusting happens in seconds and the speed rope can be used by anyone – even very tall or short athletes. No cutting needed. SUITABLE FOR ALL - Men, women, kids, boxers, professional athletes or beginners. TANGLED-FREE and PVC COATED: made of high tensile twisted steel wires, makes the rope more resistant and durable. Additional Protection - 2 Rope protectors for hard surfaces included. Compact and lightweight this adult skipping rope for fitness makes it easy to achieve maximum fat burn, tone your muscles and reach peak fitness anywhere. The additional weights built-in the handles are easily detachable – gives you 3 weight types when jumping – 1) jumping without additional weights 2) Jumping with the metal top endings attached – for additional weight; 3) Jumping with the 40 grams weights attached for more efficient training, fast jumping and arms and shoulders training. What you get within the set: 2 Aluminum Ergonomically Shaped and Engraved anti-slip handles – 17,5 cm each 2 Steel wire cables with PVC protective coating – 3m each; Cable diameter – 3,0mm 2 Rope protectors – 30 cm each PrimaFit Branded Carry bag Additional weights 2 pieces x 40 grams 4 rubber O-rings Exquisite package – PrimaFit Hard Paper Luxury Gift Box – making it ideal as a gift to family member and friends
